blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for different daily versus weekly rates, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case mentions a weekly rate discount of 20%, there is no evidence that explicitly demonstrates the existence of both daily and weekly rates or how they are applied in the system. This lack of direct evidence leads to the conclusion that there is a gap in the coverage of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence and application of different daily and weekly rates.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
